violations.text: Boxes of cups were observed stored on the floor in the back storage area. Food/containers must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 02/13/2025

The risers for the 3-bay sink are constructed of concrete blocks. NonFOOD-CONTACT SURFACES of EQUIPMENT that are exposed to splash, spillage, or other FOOD soiling or that require frequent cleaning shall be constructed of a CORROSION-RESISTANT, nonabsorbent, and SMOOTH material. Approved finish provided. New Violation. Correct By: 02/13/2025

The non-food contact surfaces of the shelving in the back near the mop area have an accumulation of old rodent droppings. Paint cans etc to be pulled off shelves and area to be cleaned. New Violation. Correct By: 02/13/2025

Wood is used in the construction of risers under the 3 bay sink. Non-food contact surfaces of equipment that are exposed to splash, spillage, or other food soiling or that require frequent cleaning must be constructed of a nonabsorbent and smooth material. New Violation. Correct By: 01/24/2024
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the chlorine/bleach sanitizing solution for the 3 Bay Sink. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 01/10/2024
